name: shattered-dominion-pixel-dungeon
description: Roguelike multiplayer (até 8 jogadores) inspirado nas mecânicas do Pixel Dungeon (watabou). Cliente Phaser 4 + servidor autoritativo Colyseus.

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @shattered-dominion/shared build && concurrently -k -n shared,server,client -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm --filter @shattered-dominion/shared dev" "pnpm --filter @shattered-dominion/server dev" "pnpm --filter @shattered-dominion/client dev"
